**NATURAL LIGHT HEADSHOTS | NO SESSION FEE | CENTRAL LONDON - LIMITED AVAILABILITY (NEXT 2 WEEKS)**

*Casting-friendly, authentic natural light headshots that actually look and feel like you.*
* Shot by an agency-endorsed photographer with years of experience working with actors, dancers and models, who will provide support and direction to bring out your best.
* No session fee — only invest in the editing (£30/edit*) of what you want to use - weekday morning sessions on location central London.

*Interested - DM here or linked insta below (more work can be seen):*

Headshots - https://www.instagram.com/kensington_portraits/
Fashion - https://www.instagram.com/the_taikan/

*Selection made via contact sheet within a week

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE
Galway - Ireland

Independent short film STILL LIFE is casting for the lead role of COOPER.

🎭 ROLE: COOPER 

Age: Late 20s – early 30s 

Gender: Open (all genders / non-binary encouraged) 

Accent: Open (Irish a plus, not essential)

This is a subtle, internal, performance-led role requiring strong screen presence and emotional depth.

✨ We are looking for: 

Naturalistic actors with strong screen presence, comfortable with stillness, silence, and nuance. Experience in film/TV preferred.

📍 Location: Ireland (Galway) 

📅 Shoot Dates: April 5th–6th 2026 

Rate: Paid & expenses +travel 

🎥 Audition: Self-tape (shortlisted actors will receive sides)

📩 To apply, please send: 

Headshot 

CV / Spotlight (if available) 

Showreel (if available) 

Location + availability 

Email: hello@prpam.ie 

Subject: COOPER CASTING

A character-driven indie exploring grief, memory, and the blurred line between reality and the supernatural.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL Seeking actors for GALWAY (SHORT FILM) short film shooting April 5th & & 6th in Galwa ROLE: COOPER (Lead) Non-binary, mid 20s-early 30s Open to all gender expressions Natural, grounded presence Strong emotional range (grief/inner conflict) Subtle, film-focused performance style PROJECT A character-driven short exploring themes grief with subtle supernatural elements. Intimate and performance-led. SHOOT DETAILS Galway 戦 April 5th 6th Short film/ proof of concept APPLY Please send: Headshot Showreel (or ecent self- - Short intro relevant experience Paid. hello@prpam.ie Subject line: COOPER CASTING -[Your Name] Open to both represented and non-represented actors.'

topComments.text: What happens to people after they hit, say, 35?  Logan's Run, perhaps?  Can anyone out there make a film about someone older that post-adolescence?

OPEN CASTING CALL (casting for supporting roles)

Please send any submissions to: theanswershortfilm26@gmail.com

Logline:
A respected working actor appears to have everything, career momentum, a loving family, and control over his life, until subtle cracks reveal he may be performing the very reality he refuses to confront.

Location: Los Angeles 

Submission Deadline: April 1st 

Shoot Date: April 18th

Non Paid/Non Union

RACHEL: Female, 20s-30s, Open Ethnicity Relaxed, Social, easygoing. NICOLE: Female, 20s-30s, Open Ethnicity Quiet, observant, friend of Rachel 1ST AD: OPEN GENDER, 30s, Open Ethnicity Authoritative, effiecent, composed. items.text:
DONNA GROSSMAN CASTING  -NOW CASTING — ACTOR MOMS WITH THEIR OWN 6 - 8 MONTH OLD BABY

Non‑Union • Goat Milk for Babies

We’re casting a real mother, who is an actor, and her baby for a warm, authentic, user-generated style video campaign.

Production is looking for a genuine, playful mother-baby connection, and the natural rhythm that only comes from a real parent and child.

MOM
25–35 years old

Dark hair / US Latina or mixed‑race look preferred, but open to all

Strong with conversational copy (NO ACCENTS)

Warm, natural, responsive to baby, comfortable ad‑libbing

BABY
6–8 months old

Expressive, curious, babbly, sweet

Not too much hair (still very baby‑like)

RATES + USAGE
Mom Session: $750 + 20%

Baby Session: $500 + 20%

Mom Usage (If Final video/stills are used): $7,000 + 20%

Baby Usage (If Final video/stills are used): $3,000 + 20%

Usage: 1‑year worldwide digital/social (no broadcast)

ONE SHOOT DAY:
Week of April 6 or April 13

To submit, please email Dgcasting@donnagrossmancasting.com with your name, your baby’s age, and recent photos.

* Special Note: Baby will not need to drink goat milk.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of baby
May be an image of baby, smiling and sleepwear
May be an image of baby and smiling
May be an image of baby, smiling and sleepwear

Ingen burde dø af kræft, endsige miste synet. Derfor vil jeg dele en opskrift på at fjerne alle kræftceller fra din krop og forhindre synstab.
For at blive ved med at modtage mine opskrifter, skal du bare sige noget ... Tak!

items.text: I aften lavede min svigermor aftensmad med hakket oksekød, men hun skyllede det ikke. Jeg kunne ikke spise det, og jeg forhindrede også mine børn i at spise det. Jeg skyller altid hakket oksekød inden tilberedning. Jeg kan ikke fatte, at hun ikke gør det. Er det ikke nødvendigt? Se detaljerne i den første kommentar.

Happy World Theatre Day 🎭

Dankbar für das Vertrauen 
unserem Publikum,
unseren Förderern und UnterstützerInnen. 

Es bedeutet uns sehr viel,
in frauenzentrierten Theaterprojekten
als Initiatorinnen aktiv zu sein. ✨

Alles Gute zum Welttheatertag.🎭

#frauenreferatfrankfurt #kulturamt #buntefrauen #actingflow #theater #frankfurt #dünyatiyatrolargünü #schauspiel #acting #womenempowerment #womensupportingwomen 🎭

unserem Publikum,
unseren Förderern und UnterstützerInnen. 

Es bedeutet uns sehr viel,
in frauenzentrierten Theaterprojekten
als Initiatorinnen aktiv zu sein. ✨

Alles Gute zum Welttheatertag.🎭

#frauenreferatfrankfurt #kulturamt #buntefrauen #actingflow #theater #frankfurt #dünyatiyatrolargünü #schauspiel #acting #womenempowerment #womensupportingwomen 🎭

items.text:
Har du god energi på kamera og elsker shopping, hverdagsinspiration og formidling? 📸 Så er det måske dig, vi leder efter som vært til City 2’s sociale medier.

Vi søger 1 vært, der har lyst til at være ansigtet udadtil på City 2’s kanaler og formidle content på en naturlig og imødekommende måde. Vi står for optagelse, redigering og alt det praktiske – du skal blot være ansigtet udadtil og får et færdigt script med det, der skal siges.

Om rollen:
• Medvirken i månedligt content til TikTok, Instagram og Facebook.
• Frekvens: Optages én gang om måneden.
• Optagelser foregår i City 2 Shoppingcenter.
• Tidsrum: kl. 13–16.
• Content bruges både organisk og til paid annoncering. Organisk annoncering er gratis opslag, der vises naturligt til følgere og andre brugere. Paid annoncering er opslag, man betaler for, så de vises til flere og udvalgte målgrupper.
• Script sendes på forhånd, så der er god tid til forberedelse.

Vi leder efter dig, der:
• Har god energi og er naturlig på kamera.
• Har en imødekommende og troværdig udstråling.
• Er tryg ved at tale til kamera og skabe nærvær.
• Er fleksibel og kan indgå i en løbende content-plan.
• Har erfaring fra lignende opgaver (bare en bonus)

Praktisk info.:
• Løn på dagsbasis

Sådan søger du:
• Send mig en kort video (30–60 sek.), hvor du formidler et valgfrit budskab til kamera – fx om noget, du holder af, dig selv eller en hverdagsoplevelse. MAIL: Simone@beyond11.dk.

👉 Går du med en vært gemt i maven 
– eller kender du én, der kunne være et godt match? Så hører vi meget gerne fra dig.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text

🌿✨ **STATISTER SØGES – MØDRE MED BARN** ✨🌿

Vil du og dit barn være med i en hyggelig optagelse i smukke, naturlige omgivelser? 🎬💚

Vi søger **mødre med barn** til at agere statister i en havescene. Det bliver en rolig og hyggelig dag med fokus på nærvær og naturlige øjeblikke 🌸

👩‍👧 **Hvem søger vi?**

* Mødre med barn/børn på maks 10 år.

* Jer der har lyst til at være foran kamera i uformelle rammer

* Ingen erfaring nødvendig

📍 Juulsøgaarden: Lavenvej 22, 8600 Skanderborg.

⏰ lørdag og søndag (4 og 5 april)

💰 Jobbet er ulønnet - I vil dog være garanteret en sjov og hyggelig dag, samt jeres navn på rollelisten🙌

Lyder det som noget for jer? 💫

Eller vil du bare høre lidt mere?…

..Send en mail til darchyproductions@gmail.com eller send en direkte besked til mig – vi glæder os til at høre fra jer!

Del meget gerne opslaget 🙏

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of child

items.text:
The next installment in the My Horrible Roommate Winnie The Pooh series!
My Horrible Lover Winnie The Pooh is the next installment within the series. This will be a short film, rather then a full on feature length film like the last two. This is meant to be somewhat of a filler while also contributing to the ongoing story.

I am looking for a female to play the lover of Pooh. 

Character Description: a women who also has a thing for killing. She has a bad girl attitude, but also has a sweet spot for Pooh.

Age Range, 21 and up.

Location, Fort Collins 

Compensation: None

This will be premiering on YouTube along with the rest of the films. Please send me a message for more info!!

I am also looking for extras to be apart of the kill count as well!!

items.text:
Craxis Studios Casting Call for Indie Film
Title: Despondence

Genre: Coming of Age/Drama

Logline: A sick teenager flees his abusive home in search of freedom, meeting new people as he goes, but as life on the road unravels and the weight of what he left behind begins to close in, he’s forced to confront the truth that some things can’t be outrun.

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Craxis Studios

Contact information: craxisstudios@gmail.com

Run Time: 45min-1hr

Compensation: While monetary compensation currently isn’t possible, the studio hopes that it can be, as of now Compensation will be in Food and Credits. 

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume, and reel if you have one. 

Filming Location: Denver-Aurora 

Project Description: Despondence is a character-driven short film about grief, memory, and the illusion of escape. It follows a teenager who leaves behind a troubled home in search of something better, only to confront the emotional weight of what he can’t outrun. Despondence also being the start of our studio.
